## Checklist

- [ ] `skills-ref validate` passes for every new or changed skill
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated under `## [Unreleased]` in the same commit
- [ ] New skills added to the correct `profiles/*.json`
- [ ] `README.md` "Skills by Domain" table updated
- [ ] Commits follow Conventional Commits (`feat(skill-name): ...`)
- [ ] No secrets or credentials in skill files
- [ ] PR title matches commit convention
